summary: This week's AI news highlights significant advancements in various fields, including robotics, AI research, and enterprise applications. Notable stories include Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI, the launch of new AI-powered features by Google, and the growing adoption of AI in industries such as healthcare and finance.
insight: The increasing use of AI in various industries is driving innovation and growth, but also raises concerns about data privacy, security, and the need for responsible AI development.
highlights: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secrets, potentially disrupting OpenAI's IPO plans
Google launches new AI-powered features, including personalized avatars and improved search capabilities
NVIDIA introduces new Jetson Thor computers to advance mainstream robotics and edge AI

articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
articles.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
